description: LFO section: shape (TRI/SIN/SAW/SQR/S&H/RND), rate, fade mode/time, delay, pitch/filter/amp depth + key follow. Mod LFO: similar but modwheel-controlled. Aftertouch: cutoff/amp depth. Misc: env loop mode/sync, portamento legato. These are secondary panels within each partial tab.
title: Web: SN-S LFO + Mod + Aftertouch panels
